title: Spicy Korean Rice Krispies Cereal Treats
description: A sweet and spicy twist on the classic cereal treat. Inspired by Korean flavors, these treats are perfect for a fun snack or dessert.
instructions: Melt the marshmallows and richly molten chocolate syrup in a saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly.
Add the korean chili flakes and sugar, stirring until combined.
Remove from heat and add the Rice Krispies cereal. Stir until the cereal is evenly coated.
Press the mixture into a greased 9x13-inch pan.
Let cool and cut into bars.
Optional: Add a sprinkle of korean chili flakes on top of the treats for extra spice.
Note: If using chocolate chips, melt them with the marshmallows and chili flakes in the saucepan.
